settings.heading: Outerwear, built to layer.
settings.lead: Modular shells, liners, and base layers — each engineered to work alone or together.

settings.heading: Modular
settings.body: Clip in liners; clip out shells. The system grows with the season.

settings.heading: Repairable
settings.body: Send it back. We patch it. Lifetime guarantee on every piece.

settings.heading: Recycled fibers
settings.body: 70% post-consumer recycled across the line. Headed to 100% by 2028.

settings.heading: Built to outlast
settings.body: Engineered for 10+ years of use. We're not interested in seasonal turnover.

settings.title: Pick a shell
settings.body: 3-layer Pertex Shield for waterproofing. RECCO reflector standard.

settings.title: Add a liner
settings.body: Down or synthetic. Clips into the shell or wears alone.

settings.heading: Portuguese craft, technical specs.
settings.body: Our shells are cut and stitched in a 50-person factory in Porto that has been making outerwear since 1962. Same family, same building, same standards.

settings.heading: Numbers, not claims.
settings.body: We publish a quarterly impact report. Verified by an external auditor.

settings.label: Post-consumer recycled material across the line

settings.quote: Took the shell + down liner combo on a 14-day Patagonia expedition. Both came back better than they left.
settings.author: K. Adigun

settings.quote: I run hot. The modular system means I can layer down without overheating.
settings.author: M. Park

settings.quote: The repair turnaround was 11 days for a torn shell. Insanely good service.
settings.author: S. Holm

settings.quote: Functional outerwear from a brand that actually means "buy it once."
The Patagonia of the next decade.
Modular outerwear, done with rare honesty.

settings.question: What's the waterproof rating?
settings.answer: 20,000mm hydrostatic head; 15,000 g/m²/24h breathability. PFAS-free DWR.

settings.question: How do the modular clips work?
settings.answer: YKK Aquaguard zips at hem, hood, and pit zips. Liner snaps in via 8 stainless attachment points.

settings.question: Repair turnaround?
settings.answer: Avg 14 days. Free shipping both ways for warranty repairs.

settings.question: Sizing?
settings.answer: True-to-size. Use the size guide on each product page for precise measurements.
